decision.recommended_next_work_item: G2.293 no-source get_postgresql_session ownership / route-provider decision after PR #445 human review
decision.reason: G2.291 is merged and the data_source_registry provider lane is closed. The highest remaining active non-closed route/helper surface is get_postgresql_session across auth, admin, and market modules. It resolves to two underlying database helper definitions, including a CRITICAL-impact core/database.py target, so only a no-source ownership decision is selected and PR #445 must stop for human review.
